vision: A mobile app for individuals to manage daily tasks efficiently through creation, completion tracking, and organization of tasks.

epics.name: Task Management
epics.description: Core functionality for creating, completing, and deleting tasks

stories.title: Create task with title and due date
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to create a task with a title and due date, so that I can track what needs to be done and when
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button Then I see a form to enter task title and due date
Given I am on the create task form When I enter a title and due date and tap save Then the task is added to my task list
Given I am on the create task form When I try to save without a title Then I see an error message requiring a title
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - establishes core data model

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress and know what is done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task When I tap the complete button on that task Then the task is marked as complete
Given I have a completed task When I view it in the list Then it displays a visual indicator showing completion status
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - core task state management

stories.title: Delete task from list
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove tasks I no longer need
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I tap the delete button on that task Then the task is removed from my list
Given I tap delete on a task When the deletion is triggered Then I see a confirmation before the task is permanently removed

epics.name: Task Viewing
epics.description: Functionality for viewing and browsing tasks

stories.title: View all tasks in a list
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks saved When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I am viewing the task list When I look at each task Then I can see the title, due date, and completion status

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Functionality for filtering and organizing task views

stories.title: Filter tasks by completion status
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to filter tasks by complete and incomplete, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I select the incomplete filter Then I only see tasks that are not completed
Given I am viewing my task list When I select the complete filter Then I only see tasks that are completed
Given I have a filter applied When I select show all Then I see all tasks regardless of completion status
